product_overview: RECEPTOR PRO is an AI-powered menu designer combining creative recipe generation and structured tech card management with full integration into IIKO restaurant management system. It enables users to generate, convert, manage, and export detailed recipes and tech cards enhanced by AI and robust product catalog mapping, serving professional restaurant and catering businesses.
core_goals: Enable users to generate creative AI-powered recipes (V1) with rich descriptions and emojis for culinary inspiration.
Convert creative V1 recipes into structured V2 tech cards with detailed cost calculations, nutritional info, and product catalog integration suitable for IIKO RMS.
Provide comprehensive integration with IIKO RMS for product catalog synchronization, article allocation, and exporting tech cards in compatible formats.
Support automated and manual SKU mapping to IIKO product codes including fuzzy matching and fallback mechanisms to ensure accuracy of ingredient identification.
Offer advanced AI tools as PRO features including food pairing, sales scripts, and inspiration generation to enhance culinary creativity.
Implement secure user authentication, session management, and strict user data isolation ensuring multi-tenant security.
Allow exporting of tech cards in multiple formats (XLSX, CSV, PDF, ZIP) optimized for IIKO imports and operational use.
Maintain detailed user history and enable seamless navigation between recipe versions and tech card views.
Employ feature flags for controlled rollout of experimental features and PRO feature gating for subscription users.
key_features: AI Recipe Generation (V1): Creative recipe generation using OpenAI's GPT models with vivid descriptions and emojis to inspire users.
Tech Card V2 Conversion: Transform V1 AI-generated recipes into structured V2 tech cards including cost calculation, nutrition (KBJU), and integration with IIKO RMS product catalogs.
IIKO RMS Integration: End-to-end synchronization with IIKO including product catalog import, article allocation, SKU mapping, and data export in multiple formats.
Automated SKU Mapping & Enhanced Mapping Service: Automatic and manual ingredient mapping with fuzzy matching and fallback article code generation to maintain data consistency.
Nutrition Calculator (KBJU): Nutritional value computation for calories, proteins, fats, and carbohydrates per 100g and per serving.
Multi-format Export System: Export tech cards in XLSX, CSV, PDF, and ZIP formats tailored for IIKO system import and operational needs.
User Authentication & Session Management: SHA1 hash-based login system with session tokens ensuring data isolation per user.
Subscription and Billing Integration: YooKassa integration for subscription management enabling PRO feature access.
Feature Flags System: Dynamic enabling/disabling of features such as HACCP compliance, new tech card versions, and AI tools for controlled user exposure.
History & Navigation Management: Persistent user history for tech cards and recipes with UI navigation controls.
Responsive React Frontend: Mobile-friendly and performant SPA with modals, forms, progress bars, and user feedback.
user_flow_summary: User logs in securely and accesses main dashboard with AI Kitchen, recipe generation, and tech card management views.
User creates a V1 recipe using AI-powered generation with options for inspiration and food pairing in the AI Kitchen.
User converts a V1 recipe into a structured V2 tech card enriched with cost calculations, nutritional details, and automated SKU mapping.
User edits or manually maps ingredients for accuracy with the integration of IIKO RMS product catalog.
User initiates preflight checks for ingredient compliance before exporting tech cards.
User exports finalized tech cards in preferred formats (ZIP archive containing XLSX, CSV, PDF) for import into IIKO RMS.
User views historical data of created recipes and tech cards with persistent navigation and state management.
Subscription and billing integrations gate access to PRO AI features and advanced tools.
Administrators and advanced users toggle feature flags to enable or disable experimental or PRO features based on user roles and subscription status.
validation_criteria: Successful generation of creative V1 recipes with rich descriptions and presence of emojis.
Accurate conversion from V1 recipes to V2 tech cards with cost, nutrition, and product mapping correctly applied.
Full integration test with IIKO RMS ensuring product catalog sync, article allocation, and export formats work correctly.
Automated SKU/ingredient mapping accuracy validated through fuzzy matching and fallback strategies; manual overrides possible.
Nutrition calculations conform to standard KBJU metrics per portion and per 100 grams.
Exported files (XLSX, CSV, PDF, ZIP) meet IIKO RMS import requirements and maintain data integrity.
User authentication and session tokens enforce strict user data isolation and prevent unauthorized access.
Subscription and billing system gate PRO features reliably and accurately reflect subscription status.
Feature flags correctly toggle availability of experimental and PRO features without breaking existing functionality.
UI responsiveness tested across devices including mobile and desktop with appropriate states and feedback.
Historical user data is persisted correctly with accurate retrieval, navigation, and record filtering.
Backend and frontend logging capture critical events such as AI generation timings, export operations, and errors for troubleshooting.
Preflight export checks detect unmapped ingredients and block export until resolved, ensuring data quality.
